title: Hundred Club
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Hundred Club''' was the term used to refer to those [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]] that were worth 100,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] or more.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]'' {{1stm}}
